[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a stylized anime-style portrait of a dark-haired character shown close-up against a plain white background with two repeated instances of the text “ITA IYO” and yellow crying-face emojis.

The main subject is a drawn character with spiky dark hair and a partially closed eye, facing forward with one arm raised so that a hand covers part of the side of the face. The character wears a dark outfit with a visible collar and layered clothing details, and the overall coloring includes gray, black, and some teal/blue tones in the inner clothing area.

The setting is a simple, flat white background with no visible environment. The camera angle appears to be a front-facing close-up, cropped around the head and upper torso.

The lighting is flat and graphic, with bold black linework and high-contrast shading. The composition places the character centrally, while large white text with a black outline appears in the upper left area reading “ITA IYO” and again near the lower left reading “ITA IYO.” Two yellow circular crying-face emojis with blue drooping shapes are placed near the top right and bottom right of the image.

Visible Text: ITAIYO (appears twice)

Practical Summary: A cropped anime-style illustration shows a dark-haired character with one hand up near the face, surrounded by two crying-face emojis. Large outlined text reading “ITAIYO” appears twice on the white background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

ITA IYO  
[emoji]

ITA IYO  
[emoji]

# Structured Version

- **ITA IYO**  
  - 😟 (thinking/sad face emoji)
- **ITA IYO**  
  - 😟 (thinking/sad face emoji)

# Notes

- The text appears to read **“ITA IYO”**, but the spacing/lettering is slightly unclear due to stylization. If it’s actually **“ITAIYO”** (no space) the “I” and spacing are not fully distinguishable.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
